commands.repair_reason: - [P1] No automated repair is appropriate; the remaining gate is current-head Windows proof or explicit maintainer acceptance of equivalent validation.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern was found; the diff changes one test file and leaves runtime credential storage, dependencies, workflows, lockfiles, and package scripts unchanged. (sha=d114cc07136fc422e41852b9fc44fe174c6ba86f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Zalouser credential persistence test to split POSIX permission assertions from Windows file-existence checks and skip the symlink rejection test based on actual file-symlink capability.

PR surface: Tests +72. Total +72 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user-facing bug; this is a test-only PR. Source inspection shows current main and v2026.6.8 hard-skip the relevant Windows checks, while the PR body has earlier Windows terminal output for the test file.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is appropriate; the remaining gate is current-head Windows proof or explicit maintainer acceptance of equivalent validation.

target.title: test: make zalo credentials tests compatible with Windows
target.body:
Enables running Zalo credentials tests on Windows: 1) by conditionalizing POSIX-specific permission stat mode checks so we only assert them on POSIX platforms, while validating directory/file presence on Windows, and 2) by replacing the hardcoded Windows skip with a dynamic file symlink capability probe.

### Verified Windows Proof

The following test execution log shows the test run on Windows. All 7 runnable tests passed successfully, and the symlink test was gracefully skipped (1 skipped, 7 passed) due to the absence of symlink privileges:

```
 RUN  v4.1.7 C:/Users/ANIRUDDHA/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/openclaw

 ✓  extension-zalo  ../../extensions/zalouser/src/zalo-js.credentials.test.ts (8 tests | 1 skipped) 443ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed | 1 skipped (8)
```
target.author: aniruddhaadak80
